content.text: list what tools you have available

content.thinking: The user wants me to list the tools I have available. This is a simple question that doesn't require any delegation or complex orchestration. Let me just list them directly.

content.text:
`delegate` — work to specialist subagents (scout, coder, reviewer, researcher, writer)

`chain` — sequential multi-step delegation with `{previous}` placeholder

`read` — read files (text + images)

`write` — create/overwrite files

`edit` — precise file edits (multiple disjoint edits per call)

`bash` — execute bash commands

`lint` — run linter (auto-detect biome/eslint/tsc/ruff/mypy/...)

`typecheck` — run `tsc --noEmit`

`grep` — search file contents (regex/literal)

`find` — search files by glob

`ls` — list directory contents

`web_search` — web search via Perplexity/Exa/Gemini with optional full content fetch

`fetch_content` — fetch URLs, YouTube transcripts, GitHub repos, local video frames

`code_search` — search code examples, API docs, GitHub/SO

`get_search_content` — retrieve stored content from prior search/fetch by responseId
